mapper.select: select t.*,(select count(0) from test_technicist i where t.id=i.team_id and i.del_flag=0 ) as technicistCount from test_team t ${ew.customSqlsegment}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_team(name, pid, code, team_lead, team_lead1, lead_tel, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.pid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.teamLead}, #{entity.teamLead1}, #{entity.leadTel}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into test_team(name, pid, code, team_lead, team_lead1, lead_tel, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.pid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.teamLead}, #{entity.teamLead1}, #{entity.leadTel}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update name = values(name) , pid = values(pid) , code = values(code) , team_lead = values(team_lead) , team_lead1 = values(team_lead1) , lead_tel = values(lead_tel) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
